problem id: 53d09e5a
category: bit_manipulation

rule: (ROT(1) XOR NOT SHL(6)) OR SHR(1)

examples:
  11100010 -> 11111011
  11100011 -> 11111001
  11101110 -> 11110111
  11010101 -> 01111110
  11000101 -> 01110110
  00011100 -> 11001111
  11011110 -> 11101111
  00010010 -> 01011011
  11011010 -> 11101111

query: 00110001
predicted answer: 11011101
